student_name: Ana Paula Porto de Oliveira Fornazari
hub_subtitle: Inglês do dia a dia — apresentar-se, rotina e conversação

lesson.menu_desc: Describing your neighborhood and city with there is / there are and prepositions of place -- 33 slides
lesson.subtitle: Lesson 3 -- My Neighborhood & My City
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Ana Paula Porto de Oliveira Fornazari | Lesson 3 -- My Neighborhood & My City
lesson.grammar_point: there is / there are + prepositions of place

listenings.text: Welcome to the heart of downtown. Right now, you are standing in the main square. There is a famous landmark in front of you: the old clock tower. On the corner, across from the tower, there is a traditional bakery with wonderful bread. If you walk two blocks north, there are several museums next to the river. There is a pharmacy and a small market near the bus stop, so everything you need is very convenient. Enjoy your walk, and please use the crosswalks, because the traffic here can be busy.

Hi Ana Paula, it is Sarah. I am downtown right now, very close to your neighborhood. Let us meet for lunch! There is a lovely cafe on the corner of Fifth Avenue, right across from the big square. It is next to the pharmacy, just behind the old church. There is a lot of traffic today, so take the crosswalk near the landmark and walk one block. See you soon. Bye!

extra_audio.text: Welcome the guest and say where you live. Say what there is on your street or corner. Describe the shops and places near your home. Explain why the location is so convenient. Invite the guest to take a stroll around the block.
